ValidationRule.description: If the stage is changed to RA Presentation and the RA Lead Sent field is not filled in, then displays validtaion message
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(Stage__c), TEXT(Stage__c) ="RA Presentation", AND(ISBLANK( RA_Lead_Sent__c )))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must complete the RA Lead Sent field
